assertion_results.text: Bug parsing extracts the Environment / Version section content including the vague text (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: In bug-parsing.md, lines 49-51 show the extracted section: '### Environment / Version' followed by 'Not sure which version -- using whatever is deployed on staging.' The vague text is fully captured.

assertion_results.text: Version resolution determines that no version identifier can be extracted from the vague description (Step 4.5.2)
assertion_results.evidence: In version-resolution.md, section 4.5.2 (lines 14-22) states: 'Explicit version numbers (e.g., 0.9.0, 2.1.1): none found', 'Product-prefixed versions: none found', 'Version keywords followed by numbers: none found', 'The section contains only vague text... No version pattern can be extracted.' Result: 'No version identifier could be extracted. Skipping to sub-step 4.5.6 (gap flagging).'

assertion_results.text: Version resolution outputs the gap comment: 'Affects Version could not be determined from the bug description — please set manually.' (Step 4.5.6)
assertion_results.evidence: In version-resolution.md, section 4.5.6 (line 42) shows the comment text, and the ADF JSON at line 63 contains the exact text with em dash: 'Affects Version could not be determined from the bug description — please set manually.'

assertion_results.text: The gap comment includes the Comment Footnote (Step 4.5.6)
assertion_results.evidence: In version-resolution.md, the ADF JSON (lines 58-89) includes a 'rule' divider followed by a paragraph containing: 'This comment was AI-generated by sdlc-workflow/triage-bug v0.13.3.' where 'sdlc-workflow/triage-bug' is a link to 'https://github.com/RHEcosystemAppEng/sdlc-plugins'.
